name: Dnipropetrovsk Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the Cossack heritage and steel-making industry

description: A blue field with a red horizontal stripe at the bottom and the coat of arms of Dnipropetrovsk Oblast centred — a Cossack on a wreath above ears of wheat.
history: Adopted as the regional flag of Dnipropetrovsk Oblast, an industrial region in central-southeastern Ukraine on the Dnipro river; the design references the Cossack and Zaporozhian heritage of the territory.
